description: Preferred CVE intelligence sources for vulnerability analysis and report links.

sources.name: CVE.org Record
sources.notes: Canonical CVE record maintained by the CVE program.

sources.name: NVD Detail
sources.notes: NIST NVD enrichment, CVSS, CWE, CPE and references.

sources.name: CISA KEV Catalog
sources.notes: Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog; prioritize if CVE is listed.

sources.name: CISA KEV JSON
sources.notes: Machine-readable CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.

sources.name: FIRST EPSS API
sources.notes: Exploit Prediction Scoring System probability and percentile.

sources.name: OSV
sources.notes: Open Source Vulnerabilities database with ecosystem and package context.

sources.name: GitHub Advisory Database
sources.notes: GitHub advisory search by CVE ID.

sources.name: Ubuntu Security
sources.notes: Ubuntu package status and fixed versions.

sources.name: Debian Security Tracker
sources.notes: Debian package status and security tracker.

sources.name: Red Hat CVE Database
sources.notes: Red Hat severity, package impact and errata context.
